channel.title: Glenn Greenberg — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Glenn Greenberg (Brave Warrior Advisors) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Glenn Greenberg: ADDED SCHW (+10%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Glenn Greenberg (Brave Warrior Advisors) added SCHW in Q4 2025 · 19.6% of portfolio. Concentrating further on top conviction.

item.title: Glenn Greenberg: ADDED V (+8%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Glenn Greenberg (Brave Warrior Advisors) added V in Q4 2025 · 10.2% of portfolio. More Visa.

item.title: Glenn Greenberg: ADDED SCHW (+8%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Glenn Greenberg (Brave Warrior Advisors) added SCHW in Q3 2025 · 17.8% of portfolio. Top conviction add.

item.title: Glenn Greenberg: ADDED V (+12%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Glenn Greenberg (Brave Warrior Advisors) added V in Q3 2025 · 9.4% of portfolio. Adding Visa.

item.title: Glenn Greenberg: TRIMMED FIS (-15%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Glenn Greenberg (Brave Warrior Advisors) trimmed FIS in Q3 2025 · 7.3% of portfolio. Material FIS reduction.

item.title: Glenn Greenberg: ADDED SCHW (+6%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Glenn Greenberg (Brave Warrior Advisors) added SCHW in Q2 2025 · 16.9% of portfolio. Starting the big Schwab build.

item.title: Glenn Greenberg: TRIMMED FIS (-10%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Glenn Greenberg (Brave Warrior Advisors) trimmed FIS in Q2 2025 · 8.1% of portfolio. First FIS trim.

item.title: Glenn Greenberg: ADDED SCHW (+4%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Glenn Greenberg (Brave Warrior Advisors) added SCHW in Q1 2025 · 16.3% of portfolio. Pre-building Schwab.
